game_name: Arcanum: Of Steamworks and Magick Obscura

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based & Real-time Combat Modes
special_mechanics.description: Game supports real-time combat, turn-based combat, and a faster version of turn-based combat. Player engagement mechanics vary by mode selection.

special_mechanics.name: Isometric Perspective Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game rendered in isometric perspective with open world navigation. Player travels through game world in real-time, visiting locations and interacting with inhabitants.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay mechanics and combat system overview. No physics parameters, movement values, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data documented. Game is RPG-focused with emphasis on character skills and quest choices rather than precise movement mechanics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Arcanum: Of Steamworks and Magick Obscura
